notes:
A new look — a themable, translucent **"liquid glass"** appearance system.
Everything lives in **Settings → Appearance** and previews live. No change to how
the app works; just how it looks. (Window Chrome & Appearance Spec.)

**New**

- **Themes.** Six full themes — **Light, Dark, Cream, Slate, Purple, and Auto**
  (Auto follows your OS light/dark). Each recolours the whole window.
- **Liquid glass.** Translucent sidebar, content and panels over a choice of
  **gradient backdrops** (Aurora, Blush, Dusk, Sand, Mono, None), with adjustable
  **window/sidebar opacity, blur and vibrancy** — a single “Glass intensity”
  slider, or fine-tune each.
- **Accent colours.** Five accents that colour links, the active item, mentions,
  badges and focus rings.
- **Presets.** **Paper**, **Focus Dark** and **Warm** — one click sets theme +
  backdrop + glass together.
- **Text density.** Compact / Cozy / Comfortable scales all text (layout and hit
  targets stay put).
- **Active-tab and right-panel styling**, plus a **Reduce transparency** option.

**Accessibility**

- **Reduce transparency** (manual, and automatic when your OS asks for reduced
  transparency or more contrast) forces solid, legible surfaces while keeping your
  chosen colours. Opacity floors, vetted backdrops and an opaque text ladder keep
  text readable at any setting; the theme cross-fade honours “reduce motion”.

**Under the hood**

- A runtime theming engine computes the design tokens per theme/accent/glass and
  sets them on one wrapper, so the whole app recolours with **no per-component
  changes**. Your previous light/dark preference migrates automatically; every
  other setting is preserved.
